# get_project query

## 001_select_projects.sql

### SQLの概要

Project詳細レスポンスを組み立てるため、Projectと関連metadataを取得する。

### 利用するテーブル

- `projects`
- `project_api_keys`
- `project_usage_plans`
- `project_cognito_clients`
- `project_cognito_client_urls`
- `project_members`

### 引数

| 取得元テーブル | 項目 | 型 | nullable |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| <code>project_members, projects</code> | <code>actor_principal_id</code> | <code>str</code> | no |
| <code>projects</code> | <code>project_id</code> | <code>UUID</code> | no |
| <code>-</code> | <code>is_hub_admin</code> | <code>Any</code> | no |

### 戻り値

| 取得元テーブル | 項目 | 型 | nullable |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| <code>projects</code> | <code>project_id</code> | <code>UUID</code> | no |
| <code>projects</code> | <code>project_code</code> | <code>str</code> | no |
| <code>projects</code> | <code>name</code> | <code>str</code> | no |
| <code>projects</code> | <code>description</code> | <code>str</code> | no |
| <code>projects</code> | <code>owner_principal_id</code> | <code>str</code> | no |
| <code>projects</code> | <code>department_code</code> | <code>str</code> | no |
| <code>project_api_keys</code> | <code>apigw_api_key_id</code> | <code>str</code> | no |
| <code>project_api_keys</code> | <code>api_key_last4</code> | <code>str</code> | no |
| <code>project_api_keys</code> | <code>observed_enabled</code> | <code>bool</code> | no |
| <code>project_usage_plans</code> | <code>apigw_usage_plan_id</code> | <code>str</code> | no |
| <code>project_usage_plans</code> | <code>default_rate_limit</code> | <code>int &#124; None</code> | yes |
| <code>project_usage_plans</code> | <code>default_burst_limit</code> | <code>int &#124; None</code> | yes |
| <code>project_usage_plans</code> | <code>default_quota_limit</code> | <code>int &#124; None</code> | yes |
| <code>project_usage_plans</code> | <code>default_quota_period</code> | <code>str &#124; None</code> | yes |
| <code>project_cognito_clients</code> | <code>client_type</code> | <code>str</code> | no |
| <code>project_cognito_clients</code> | <code>app_client_id</code> | <code>str</code> | no |
| <code>project_cognito_clients</code> | <code>has_client_secret</code> | <code>Any</code> | no |
| <code>project_cognito_clients</code> | <code>access_token_validity</code> | <code>int</code> | no |
| <code>project_cognito_clients</code> | <code>access_token_unit</code> | <code>str</code> | no |
| <code>project_cognito_clients</code> | <code>refresh_token_rotation_enabled</code> | <code>bool</code> | no |
| <code>project_cognito_client_urls</code> | <code>url_type</code> | <code>str</code> | no |
| <code>project_cognito_client_urls</code> | <code>url</code> | <code>str</code> | no |

### 条件

- `JOIN ON project_api_keys.project_id = projects.project_id`
- `JOIN ON project_usage_plans.project_id = projects.project_id`
- `JOIN ON project_cognito_clients.project_id = projects.project_id`
- `JOIN ON project_cognito_client_urls.project_cognito_client_id = project_cognito_clients.project_cognito_client_id`
- `JOIN ON project_members.project_id = projects.project_id AND project_members.member_principal_id = @actor_principal_id`
- `WHERE projects.project_id = @project_id AND (projects.owner_principal_id = @actor_principal_id OR NOT project_members.project_member_id IS NULL OR @is_hub_admin = TRUE)`
